landing.en.text: Welcome to BEA! To find the perfect lessons for you, let's start by clicking 'Check your English Level' to take our short Level Test.

captions.text: Click Check your English Level to take our short Level Test.

landing.es.text: Bienvenido a BEA. Para encontrar las mejores clases para ti, haz clic en 'Check your English Level' y empieza la prueba corta.

captions.text: Haz clic en Check your English Level para empezar.

landing.ar.text: مرحبا بك في BEA. للعثور على الدروس المناسبة لك، اضغط على Check your English Level وابدأ اختبار المستوى القصير.

captions.text: اضغط على Check your English Level لبدء اختبار المستوى.

landing.zh.text: 欢迎来到 BEA。为了找到最适合你的课程，请点击 Check your English Level，开始简短的水平测试。

captions.text: 点击 Check your English Level 开始水平测试。

placement.en.text: You are on the BEA Level Test. Enter your name and email, then start the free placement test.

captions.text: You are on the BEA Level Test.
Enter your name and email, then start the free test.

postTest.en.text: Great job! Your pathway is ready. Click below to try your free mini trial lesson before unlocking your full course.

captions.text: Great job! Your pathway is ready.
Try your free mini trial lesson before unlocking the full course.

trial.en.text: Let's begin in simple English. Listen, read the short captions, and try the mini lesson step by step.

captions.text: Listen, read, and try the mini lesson step by step.
